calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Samuel Merritt College, Successor In Interest to California College of Podiatric Medicine.
Karrie Cherry, Student Loan Coordinator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Dianne Stevens.
Default was entered against defendant on March 16, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Samuel Merritt College, Successor In Interest to California College of Podiatric Medicine, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dianne Stevens as follows:

Damages/Principal - $10,750.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,256.99.
Attorney's Fees - $4,822.00.
Late Fees - $230.00.
Costs - $6,228.16, for a total judgment in the amount of $30,287.15.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
